scripts.lint: biome lint src scripts package.json manifest.json README.md

scripts.check: biome check src scripts package.json manifest.json README.md
scripts.check:fix: biome check --write src scripts package.json manifest.json README.md
scripts.format: biome format --write src scripts package.json manifest.json README.md
